debug_info.goal:
case neg.inr
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Caller
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n C σ o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n C σ o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_f : Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
have h_sb : S b = false := by
            have h_knows := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at h_knows
            simpa using h_knows
          simp [h_sb]
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> (try simp at ra) <;> (try subst ra)
          case normal c =>
            refine ⟨⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
            · sorry
            · simp [h_sb]
            · use S, ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩; simp; use ⌜a c⌝; simp [roleOfIn]
            · intro _ _ T τ _ equ _ _
              have := true_of_knowldege (a_knows_after_f T τ (by simp) equ)
              rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at this
              simp [this]
          all_goals
            sorry
    case Callee => sorry
    case Other =>
      simp [not_in_call_then_invariant_resultSet ra]
      apply IH
      rw [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra]
      exact a_kv_b

have h_sb : S b = false := (stubbornness _ _ rfl).mp (true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f)
          constructor
          · simp [resultSet, ra, h_sb]
            cases C <;> simp_all [roleOfIn, stubbornness, invert, Set.mem_image] <;> subst ra
            all_goals
              refine ⟨⟨?_, fun h => a_not_know_before_t h⟩, ?_⟩
              · try (by_cases b = err <;> simp_all; right; exact h_sb)
                try (right; exact h_sb)
              · intro T τ h_equ D h_role h_sel
                have : (S, ⟨_ :: σ, o⟩) ~_a (T, ⟨D :: τ, by simp_all⟩) := ⟨by simp_all, by simp_all [equiv]⟩
                exact (stubbornness _ _ rfl).mp (true_of_knowldege ((equiv_then_know_same this.2 _).mp a_knows_after_f))
          · simp [resultSet, ra, h_sb]
            cases C <;> simp_all [roleOfIn, stubbornness, invert, Set.mem_image] <;> subst ra
            all_goals
              intro h_un h_not_ref T τ h_equ D h_role h_sel
              have : (S, ⟨_ :: σ, o⟩) ~_a (T, ⟨D :: τ, by simp_all⟩) := ⟨by simp_all, by simp_all [equiv]⟩
              exact (stubbornness _ _ rfl).mp (true_of_knowldege ((equiv_then_know_same this.2 _).mp a_knows_after_f))
rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at a_knows_after_f; exact a_knows_after_f

have sb : S b = false := by
            have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            simp [eval, stubbornness] at h; exact h
          constructor
          · sorry
          · rw [sb, Bool.not_false]; unfold resultSet; cases C <;> simp [ra] at * <;> subst ra <;> simp [eval, stubbornness]
            all_goals
              intro h; rcases h with ⟨_, not_deleted⟩
              specialize not_deleted S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl C (by simp [ra, roleOfIn]) (by simp [contribSet])
              simp [eval, stubbornness, sb] at not_deleted

have h_b : S b = false := by
            have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            simp [eval, stubbornness] at h; exact h
          subst h_b; constructor
          · unfold resultSet; simp [ra]
            cases C <;> simp [ra] at * <;> subst ra
            all_goals (refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩)
            all_goals (try (right; rw [stubbornness]; rfl))
            all_goals (try (left; rw [stubbornness]; rfl))
            all_goals (try (intro h_ref; apply a_not_know_before_t; rw [eval_dis]; left; exact true_of_knowldege h_ref))
            all_goals (try (simp; use S, ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩, rfl, equiv_refl, _; simp [roleOfIn, stubbornness]))
          · unfold resultSet; simp [ra]; intro h_in h_not_ref h_not_del; simp at h_not_del
            specialize h_not_del S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl equiv_refl _ (by assumption) (by simp)
            simp [stubbornness, eval] at h_not_del

intro h; exact a_not_know_before_t h
                · intro h; specialize h S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ _ equiv_refl rfl rfl; simp [hSb, stubbornness] at h
          · rw [hSb]; exact not_notMem_resultSet

have h_sb : S b = false := by
            have hK := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            simp [eval, stubbornness] at hK; exact hK
          constructor
          · unfold resultSet; simp [ra, h_sb]
            cases C <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra <;> simp
            all_goals sorry
          · unfold resultSet; simp [ra, h_sb]
            intro h_in; simp [resultSet] at h_in
            sorry

have h_truth := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
          have : S b = false := by
            simpa [eval, stubbornness] using h_truth
          subst this
          simp only [not_not, stubbornness, Bool.not_false]
          constructor
          · by_contra h
            have h_equi : (S, ⟨C :: σ, o⟩) ~_a (Dist.switch b S, ⟨C :: σ, o⟩) := by
              apply equi_of_equiv; unfold equiv; refine ⟨by sorry, by simp [ra], ?_⟩
              cases ra_c : roleOfIn a C <;> simp_all
              unfold contribSet; rcases same_pair_of_role ra_c with ⟨c, h_pair⟩
              simp [h_pair]; constructor <;> try constructor <;> try rfl
              · apply indistinguishable_then_same_values; apply equi_of_equiv
                unfold equiv; simp [h_pair, ra_c]; sorry
            have := a_knows_after_f (Dist.switch b S) ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ h_equi.equiv_of_equi
            simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch] at this
          · by_contra h
            have := local_is_known (k := true)
            have h_knows := true_of_knowldege (this.1 S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ h)
            have h_truth_2 := true_of_knowldege h_knows
            have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            simp [eval, stubbornness] at h_truth_2 this
            rw [h_truth_2] at this; simp at this

have sb : S b = false := by
            have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            simpa [stubbornness] using h
          constructor
          · have : (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ := by
              unfold resultSet; simp [ra, sb]
              refine ⟨⟨Or.inr (by simp [stubbornness, sb]), ?_⟩, ?_⟩
              · simpa [sb, eval] using a_not_know_before_t
              · intro T τ D equ role_eq contrib_eq
                intro h_knows_t
                have h_knows_after_t : S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ⊧ K a (Has n b (b, true) @ b) := sorry
                have h_knows_after_f : S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ⊧ K a (Has n b (b, false) @ b) := a_knows_after_f
                have := reflexivity (a := a) (S := S) (σ := ⟨C :: σ, o⟩)
                exact (h_knows_after_t S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ equiv_refl).stubbornness (by rfl) ▸ 
                      (h_knows_after_f S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ equiv_refl).stubbornness (by rfl)
            simpa [sb]
          · have : (b, true) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ := by
              unfold resultSet; simp [ra, sb]
              right; right
              intro T τ D equ role_eq contrib_eq
              have h_equ : (S, ⟨C :: σ, o⟩) ~_a (T, ⟨D :: τ, by simp; convert equ.1⟩) := sorry
              have h_knows_f := a_knows_after_f _ _ (equiv_of_equi h_equ)
              simpa [stubbornness] using h_knows_f
            simpa [sb]

have hb : S b = false := by
            have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
            rwa [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at h
          constructor
          · unfold resultSet; cases C <;> simp [ra] at ra <;> subst ra <;> simp [resultSet, hb]
            all_goals sorry
          · unfold resultSet; cases C <;> simp [ra] at ra <;> subst ra <;> simp [resultSet, hb]
            all_goals
              intro _ h; specialize h S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl (by simp [ra]); specialize h rfl
              simp [eval, stubbornness, hb] at h
              specialize h S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl equiv_refl; simp [hb] at h
    case Callee =>
      sorry
    case Other =>
      sorry
